narrative:
Ridge Township has 1,193 registered voters, with 49.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.8 percentage points.
